question: Where is the SolarTech headquarters located and how do you access it?
expected_facts: located at 4520 Nebula Lane, Seattle
access requires a Level 2 Biometric scan

question: What are the rules for the satellite office?
expected_facts: located in Austin, TX
quiet-only zone
no voice calls permitted in open areas

question: What are the core working hours?
expected_facts: 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM Core Time
employees must be online during these hours

question: How does the Green-Stripe bonus program work?
expected_facts: eligible if commute via electric unicycle or carpool with at least 3 others
monthly stipend of $150 Solar-Credits
credits can be redeemed at the cafeteria or for extra PTO
100 credits equals 1 day of PTO
credits must be logged in EcoPortal by the 25th of each month

question: What animals are allowed in the office and when?
expected_facts: dogs and domestic cats are allowed
only on Tuesdays and Thursdays
no reptiles or birds allowed
pets must wear a SolarTech Guest lanyard

question: Why are reptiles and birds not allowed in the office?
expected_facts: due to the sensitive HVAC filters in the lab

question: How much is the professional development budget and what can it be used for?
expected_facts: $3,250 per year per employee
must be used for technical skills or Future-Tech certifications
cannot be used for General Management courses
examples include Quantum Computing and Fusion Maintenance

question: How do I request approval for a training course?
expected_facts: submit request to Manager Sarah
at least 14 days before the course start date

question: Where is the 2024 annual retreat and what do I need to bring?
expected_facts: Blue Ridge Crater in Arizona
must bring own reusable Hydro-Flask
Company-issued Model X-1

question: What is the Sun-Sync leave policy?
expected_facts: 2 days per year
specifically for use during a Total Solar Eclipse or verified Aurora Borealis event

question: What is the parental leave policy and how does re-entry work?
expected_facts: 16 weeks of fully paid leave
re-entry requires a Sync-Up week
employee works only 10 hours at full pay during Sync-Up week

question: What equipment do new employees receive?
expected_facts: Solar-Pad Pro
Neural-Link headset which is optional

question: What is the home office stipend and are there any rules about treadmill desks?
expected_facts: one-time $1,200 grant for ergonomic furniture
treadmill desks are encouraged
must be under 65 decibels

question: What happens if I lose company hardware?
expected_facts: 15% Solar-Credit penalty
penalty waived with a police report or Act of Nature certificate

question: What are the email dark hours and what should I do in an emergency?
expected_facts: no internal emails between 7:00 PM and 7:00 AM
use the Red-Alert Slack channel for emergencies

question: What is the meeting mute rule?
expected_facts: meetings with more than 8 people
all microphones must be muted
unmute only when the Speaker's Prism is assigned to you

question: What disclaimer is required when using AI to draft client responses?
expected_facts: footer must include Assisted by Solar-Intelligence v2.1

question: What health and wellness benefits does SolarTech offer?
expected_facts: Light-Therapy pods limited to 20 minutes per session
10 sessions per year with Mind-Cloud therapists fully covered
gym subsidy of $80 per month for kinetic-energy-recovery machines

question: What is the password policy?
expected_facts: 16 characters
changed every 90 days
biometric overrides permitted at The Hub only

question: What are the guest access rules at the Austin office?
expected_facts: guests must be escorted at all times
forbidden from entering the Faraday Cage testing room

question: How much does a cafeteria voucher cost in Solar-Credits and is approval required?
expected_facts: 15 credits for a $20 cafeteria voucher
limit of 5 vouchers per month
no approval required

question: What is the travel policy for trips under 300 miles?
expected_facts: must use Hyper-Rail or company-approved EV
flights only permitted for Level-Red urgent client meetings

question: What is the per diem for meals during travel?
expected_facts: $75 per day for meals
reduced to $25 per day if hotel provides a Solar-Breakfast

question: What triggers the Deep-Freeze protocol and what happens?
expected_facts: activated when Seattle HQ temperature drops below 55 degrees F or during city-wide power grid failure
Level 1 staff must migrate to The Bunker on Floor B2
all Project Orion files are encrypted

question: How do employees access Project Orion files during a Deep-Freeze?
expected_facts: requires a physical YubiKey 5C
requires a 12-digit Freeze-Code
Freeze-Code is in the physical safe in Manager Sarah's office

question: How should employees communicate if Slack is down during an emergency?
expected_facts: tune to FM Radio 98.2 for status updates

question: What are the confidentiality rules for Project Orion?
expected_facts: must sign a Neural-NDA
no personal smartphones within 10 feet of the Plasma-Rig
can only discuss with Strategic Partners listed in Appendix G
Blue-Shield VPN must be active for external discussion

question: What is the maximum hotel rate for business travel and where do I book?
expected_facts: maximum $250 per night
booking must be done via the Star-Stay portal

question: How often must equipment be maintained and where?
expected_facts: every 6 months
brought to the Tech-Bar
for a Photon-Cleaning

question: What is Level-Blue data and what restrictions apply to it on mobile?
expected_facts: Level-Blue data refers to Project Orion
strictly read-only on mobile devices
